What We Host

Every Celebration, Perfectly Placed

Luxury wedding lawns, corporate events, and film production grounds

What We Host

Every Celebration, Perfectly Placed

Note: We curate and host select events at our exclusive partner venues. Kindly contact our concierge team for details.

Weddings

From the sacred pheras to the grandest baraat processions, our estate embraces the full splendour of an Indian wedding with space, serenity, and soul. Western ceremonies welcome too.

Haldi & Mehndi

Pre-wedding rituals deserve a setting as joyful as the ceremony itself. Our open grounds are perfect for vibrant haldi showers, elaborate mehndi gatherings, and musical evenings under the stars.

Receptions & Sangeet

Dance beneath the desert sky with fairy lights overhead and laughter all around. Our venue comes alive at night, offering limitless possibilities for décor, dining, and celebration.

Corporate Events

Step away from boardrooms. Our serene landscape creates the perfect backdrop for retreats, team gatherings, product launches, and curated corporate experiences in a truly unique setting.

Private Celebrations

Milestone birthdays, anniversaries, family reunions — any occasion that calls for beauty and space finds its natural home at The Chauhans Hideaway.

Photo & Film Shoots

The dramatic Rajasthani landscape, golden tones, and expansive sky make our estate a photographer's paradise. Pre-wedding shoots, fashion editorials, and film productions are warmly welcomed.
